mapper.sql: SELECT b.id, b.site_id, b.batch_code, b.batch_name, b.import_date, b.import_source, b.title_count, b.category_id, b.status, b.is_excluded, b.remark, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, COALESCE(s.name, CAST(b.site_id AS CHAR)) as site_name, c.name as category_name FROM gb_title_pool_batch b LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON b.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_categories c ON b.category_id = c.id

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null and siteId > 0

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gb_title_pool_batch
site_id, batch_code, batch_name, import_date, import_source, title_count, category_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{siteId}, #{batchCode}, #{batchName}, #{importDate}, #{importSource}, #{titleCount}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM gb_title_pool_batch WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT( 'SITE_', #{siteId}, '_', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), '_', LPAD(FLOOR(RAND() * 1000), 3, '0') ) as batch_code

SELECT r.site_id, r.is_visible, r.relation_type, s.name as site_name, s.code as site_code, s.domain as site_domain FROM gb_site_title_batch_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id WHERE r.title_batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY r.relation_type, r.site_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gb_site_title_batch_relations (site_id, title_batch_id, is_visible, relation_type) VALUES
(#{siteId}, #{batchId}, #{isVisible}, 'include')
